basic_details.job_title: PAU Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The latest Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Research Fellow posts! Published on 18 May 2026 at Punjab Agricultural University Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 1 opening for eligible candidates. Applicants possessing B.Sc. / B.Sc. (Agriculture), M.Sc. in Soil Science/Botany with NET qualification, or Ph.D. in the relevant discipline can apply offline from 18-05-2026 to 01-06-2026. Find all details about the PAU Research Fellow new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application form, and notification PDF here.

qualification.details: B.Sc. / B.Sc. (Agriculture) with minimum OCPA 6.00/10.00 basis or 60% marks. M.Sc. in Soil Science/Botany with minimum OCPA 6.50/10.00 basis or 65% marks. NET qualified (for M.Sc. candidates). Ph.D. in relevant discipline eligible in lieu of Master's degree.

salary_details.details: Rs.31000/- plus HRA per month fixed

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
